## 📄 Arxiv 前沿论文

> **爬取时间**：2026-05-29 08:14:24 UTC

本表数据来自 Arxiv 论文检索，关键词组为 `(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl|reinforcement learning)`，时间窗口 2026-04-23 ~ 2026-04-29。本周期内无符合关键词条件的论文更新。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 学科类别 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|----------|
| - | (无) | 本周期 Arxiv 无符合关键词的论文 | - | - | - | - |

## 📚 OpenAlex

本表数据来自 OpenAlex 论文检索，关键词组为 `(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl)`，时间窗口 2026-04-23 ~ 2026-04-29。共检索到 14 条结果，按评分降序排列。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 来源/venue | 引用数 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|------------|--------|
| 9 | Rule-based High-Level Coaching for Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning in Search-and-Rescue UAV Missions Under Limited-Simulation Training | 提出分层决策框架解决搜救无人机在有限仿真训练下的强化学习问题 | https://openalex.org/W7159734652 | 强化学习,无人机,搜救,分层决策,仿真训练 | 2026-04-29 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 9 | Agentic AI for Remote Sensing: Technical Challenges and Research Directions | 探讨遥感中智能体AI的技术挑战与研究方向 | https://openalex.org/W7159547268 | 遥感,智能体AI,地球观测,多步分析 | 2026-04-27 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 8 | AsyncShield: A Plug-and-Play Edge Adapter for Asynchronous Cloud-based VLA Navigation | 提出即插即用边缘适配器解决VLA模型云端异步导航问题 | https://openalex.org/W7158423535 | VLA,边缘计算,异步导航,机器人控制 | 2026-04-27 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 8 | Vision-Language-Action Safety: Threats, Challenges, Evaluations, and Mechanisms | 全面分析VLA模型的安全威胁、挑战与评估机制 | https://openalex.org/W7158423088 | VLA,安全,具身智能,评估机制 | 2026-04-26 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 8 | World-R1: Reinforcing 3D Constraints for Text-to-Video Generation | 提出强化3D约束的文本到视频生成方法 | https://openalex.org/W7158423781 | 视频生成,3D约束,强化学习,多模态 | 2026-04-27 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 8 | Cooperative Informative Sensing for Monitoring Dynamic Indoor Environments via Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning | 基于多智能体强化学习的室内环境监测 | https://openalex.org/W7158423007 | 多智能体强化学习,室内监测,感知 | 2026-04-25 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 7 | Breaking the Secret: Economic Interventions for Combating Collusion in Embodied Multi-Agent Systems | 提出经济干预方法对抗具身多智能体系统中的串通 | https://openalex.org/W7158422317 | 多智能体,安全,经济干预,串通检测 | 2026-04-26 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 7 | ReCAPA: Hierarchical Predictive Correction to Mitigate Cascading Failures | 提出层级预测校正方法缓解级联故障 | https://openalex.org/W7155654787 | VLA,级联故障,预测校正,层级方法 | 2026-04-23 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 6 | Focus Session: Hardware and Software Techniques for Accelerating Multimodal Foundation Models | 多模态基础模型加速的硬件软件协同方法 | https://openalex.org/W7157506044 | 多模态模型,硬件加速,模型压缩 | 2026-04-23 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 6 | AI Reasoning for Wireless Communications and Networking: A Survey and Perspectives | AI推理在无线通信网络中的综述与展望 | https://openalex.org/W7157506044 | 无线通信,AI推理,网络优化 | 2026-04-23 | ACM Computing Surveys | 0 |
| 6 | When AI Meets Terahertz: A Survey on the Symbiosis of Artificial Intelligence and Terahertz Networks | AI与太赫兹网络融合的综述 | https://openalex.org/W7157506032 | 太赫兹,AI,无线通信,6G | 2026-04-24 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 5 | Internet of Everything in the 6G Era: Paradigms, Enablers, Potentials and Future Directions | 6G时代万物互联的范式与方向 | https://openalex.org/W7159547179 | 6G,物联网,万物互联,网络架构 | 2026-04-27 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 5 | Reinforcement and federated learning for privacy-preserving glucose regulation: A review | 强化学习与联邦学习在血糖调节中的隐私保护 | https://doi.org/10.36922/aih026050010 | 强化学习,联邦学习,医疗AI,隐私保护 | 2026-04-24 | Artificial Intelligence in Health | 0 |
| 4 | Relay intercropping of wheat and soybean improves weed control | 农业技术与无人机除草（与主题关联度低） | https://doi.org/10.1017/wet.2026.10102 | 农业,无人机,杂草控制 | 2026-04-23 | Weed Technology | 0 |

sections.heading: 🔎 GitHub 指定日期检索
